allow: PowerShell($env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=$null; $installer = Resolve-Path "packages/desktop/release/Claude Usage Widget-0.1.2-Setup-x64.exe"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $installer.Path -ArgumentList "/S" -PassThru -Wait; Write-Output "INSTALL_EXIT=$\($p.ExitCode\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $exe = "C:\\Users\\Manan\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Claude Usage Widget\\Claude Usage Widget.exe"; $q = Start-Process -FilePath $exe -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Write-Output "RUNNING=$\(-not $q.HasExited\)")
